title: Module 2
subtitle: Module 2 aims to introduce future trainers to:
description: A training module for future trainers that covers understanding motivations and barriers of farmers and advisors, adult learning pitfalls, different types of interaction, and good practices developed within the FAIRshare project. It also presents main survey findings on digital advisory tools and introduces models of information transfer, knowledge exchange, and co-creation to facilitate effective boundary objects for knowledge exchange.
